name: Skillsoft Corp.
business: Skillsoft provides a skills management platform and associated learning solutions designed to help organizations manage the human and artificial intelligence (AI) skills lifecycle. The company's Talent Development Solutions (TDS) segment serves over 3,000 enterprise customers and 42 million employees worldwide through its Skills Management Platform, and its Learner Platform serves approximately 59 million registered learners globally. Its Global Knowledge (GK) segment delivers instructor-led training in-person and virtually, serving 75% of the Fortune 100 corporations.

exposures.sentence: Skillsoft provides a skills management platform and associated learning solutions that are designed to help organizations manage the human and artificial intelligence (AI) skills lifecycle
Content covering cloud platforms, cybersecurity, software development, DevOps, data science, AI, and related technical domains.

catalysts.event: Review of strategic alternatives for GK business
catalysts.sentence: On December 10, 2025, we announced a review of strategic alternatives for our GK business, focusing on a potential sale.

tamClaims.sentence: Skillsoft is positioned to address an estimated $450 billion market opportunity across enterprise learning, workforce development, and related skills management solutions.
